input.headline: Dancing with the Stars' season 34: See who was eliminated, who's headed to finale

raw.headline: Dancing with the Stars' season 34: See who was eliminated, who's headed to finale

winner: The dancers on *Dancing with the Stars* Season 34 were eliminated in such precise intervals that one contestant joked, "I didn’t realize we were auditioning for a choreography of *March of the Penguins*—no survival skills required!

candidates.text: I watched *Dancing with the Stars* Season 34 expecting drama, got a season of dancers quietly quitting like they realized they signed up for a ballroom marathon instead of a ballroom party.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on expectations, specific to the show's context, concise, and uses a clever metaphor."}

candidates.text: I'm glad you asked! The winner of *Dancing with the Stars* isn't the best dancer—it's just the contestant who hasn’t fallen yet.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to the show's format, with a clever twist on the idea of elimination."}

candidates.text: Why did the *Dancing with the Stars* contestant get kicked off the show? Because they kept stepping on their partner’s feet—and also on the headlines!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties the show's context with a pun on 'headlines,' but it could be more specific about the elimination or finale details."}

candidates.text: The dancers on *Dancing with the Stars* Season 34 were eliminated in such precise intervals that one contestant joked, "I didn’t realize we were auditioning for a choreography of *March of the Penguins*—no survival skills required!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific with a clever comparison to *March of the Penguins*. It ties humorously into the elimination theme while maintaining natural English."}

candidates.text: So *Dancing with the Stars* Season 34 just ended, and apparently, no one got eliminated this year—just a bunch of dancers slowly fading into the background like bad Wi-Fi.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat humorous with the Wi-Fi analogy, but it's a bit generic and doesn't directly address the headline's specifics about who was eliminated or who made the finale."}
